name: Sichuan Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Grease baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients except sesame seeds until well-blended.
4. Form into 4-inch wide and 1-inch high flat round patties. Sprinkle with sesame seeds, pressing lightly to make them adhere.
5. Place patties on baking sheet and bake for 10-14 minutes or until done in the center but not dry. Serve immediately.
